extension.news: [CR][B]4.0.3[/B][CR]- Added support for new dts audio codecs[CR]- Added wrap list option to big poster and flix library views[CR]- Added wrap list option to widget configuration[CR]- Removed lock focus position option from global widget settings[CR][CR][B]4.0.2[/B][CR]- Updated for skinshortcuts 3.0.1[CR]- Added option to show number of unwatched episodes in media flags[CR]- Added slide to vertical icon only main menu[CR]- Extended tvshow progress indicators for TMDbHelper 6.x[CR]- Improved layout of add-on info dialog[CR]- Increased size of textbox in video info dialog[CR]- Display release/first aired date instead of year in dialog video info[CR]- Increased delay of OSD autohide on pause to 5 seconds[CR]- Improved default settings for blured background[CR]- New icons for AV1/AV2[CR]- Added games to widget content type selector[CR]- Added folder "other" to default widgets category[CR]- Fixed default labels for addon shortcuts/widgets[CR]- Added script.skin.info.service to list of recommended add-ons[CR]- Removed script.favourites from list of recommended add-ons[CR]- Removed option to disable add-on fanart[CR]- Various spelling fixes[CR]- Fixed visibility of progress circle in library views[CR][CR][B]4.0.1[/B][CR]- Fixed pictures shortcuts[CR][CR][B]4.0.0[/B][CR]- Version/Extras indicators are always shown on version folders[CR]- New video OSD layout with stream selection dialog[CR]- Added PVR Provider views[CR]- Added game disc manager
extension.summary: Clair, minimaliste, élégant, simple et léger.
干净，简约，优雅，简单，轻便。
extension.description: Arctic: Zephyr - Martian basiert auf dem original Arctic: Zephyr Skin von jurialmunkey und dessen Erweiterungen durch beatmasterRS. Es ist ein minimalistisches, klares und simples Interface für deine Medien mit dem gewissen Etwas.

Arctic: Zephyr - Martian is based on the original Arctic: Zephyr skin, created by jurialmunkey and it's extension by beatmasterRS. Arctic focuses on being simple, clean and minimalistic with a light spin.

Arctic: Zephyr - Martian is based on the original Arctic: Zephyr skin, created by jurialmunkey and it's extension by beatmasterRS. Arctic focuses on being simple, clean and minimalistic with a light spin.

Arctic: Zephyr - Martian is based on the original Arctic: Zephyr skin, created by jurialmunkey and it's extension by beatmasterRS. Arctic focuses on being simple, clean and minimalistic with a light spin.
Arctic: Zephyr - Martian est basé sur le skin original Arctic: Zephyr, créé par jurialmunkey et son extension par beatmasterRS. Arctic se focalise sur le fait d'être simple, claire et minimaliste.
Arctic: Zephyr - Martian 是基于 jurialmunkey 所创 Arctic 皮肤的第三个版本，以及 beatmasterRS 对该皮肤的扩展版本。Arctic 系列皮肤主打简洁、干净且简约的风格，并略带独特设计巧思。
